validation.hotelRequired: At least one hotel must be selected
validation.commissionExceeds100: The sum of commissions (hotel + therapist) cannot exceed 100%

cancelBookingDialog.title: Are you sure you want to cancel?
cancelBookingDialog.intro: {{clientName}} was charged when booking or at checkout. <policyLink>Cancellation policy</policyLink>
cancelBookingDialog.introHold: {{clientName}} saved their card (bank imprint). No amount was charged. <policyLink>Cancellation policy</policyLink>
cancelBookingDialog.introSimple: You are about to cancel {{clientName}}'s appointment. <policyLink>Cancellation policy</policyLink>
cancelBookingDialog.noRefundNote: No card refund — payment has not been captured yet.
cancelBookingDialog.chargedToRoomNote: Charged to room — no card refund.
cancelBookingDialog.customFeeHelp: Enter either a fixed amount (€) or a percentage (%) withheld from the deposit.
cancelBookingDialog.sendNotificationHelp: The client will receive a cancellation email and SMS.
cancelBookingDialog.holdReleaseHelp: No charge was made. The card will no longer be used for this appointment.
cancelBookingDialog.refundEstimateDisclaimer: Indicative amount based on the recorded deposit; the actual refund may differ slightly.

ask.title: Leaving already?
ask.body: We can stop writing to you, promise. Though your body will keep asking for that massage.

done.title: All done.
done.body: No more reminders from us. Your booking confirmations will keep coming though — we're not letting you forget your treatment time.

unsubscribe.error: This link is no longer valid. Write to us and we'll take care of it.
